_comment: Hand-verified E5 golden numbers for the synthetic 7-day fixture. Regenerated when the fixture or scanning semantics change; each ratio is independently derivable from fixtures/synthetic-7d/generate.py + tests/test_pipeline.py::test_hand_derivable_ratios.

per_day._shape: SHELF-26a join: silver_events JOIN daily_revenue, WHERE terms on both sides; alias-qualified fact-side terms prune identically to q-01, dim-side r.revenue term is correctly dropped at scan time.
